content.legion: Chance for attack to deal increased %Damage

innerAbility.name: For Bossing
abilities: Damage to monsters inflicted with Abnormal Status +8%

innerAbility.name: For Training
abilities: Attack +21 OR Damage to Normal Monsters +8%
innerAbility.notes: Depending on what's chosen as the 1st Line, choose the other for the 2nd Line

attackStats.detail: <bg val={Stage 4}> <bg src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/natures-wrath.png} tip={Nature's Wrath (1st Job)} val={+1}> <bg src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/agile-crossbows.png} tip={Agile Crossbows (2nd Job)} val={+2}>

attackStats.detail: <bg src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/agile-crossbows.png} tip={Agile Crossbows (2nd Job)} val={+20}> <bg src={/class-icons/common/physical-training.png} tip={Physical Training (2nd Job)} val={+30}> <bg type={def} sub={opt} src={/class-icons/common/maple-warrior.png} tip={Maple Warrior (4th Job)} val={+15% to assigned AP} subSrc={/class-icons/5th-job/maple-world-goddess-blessing.png} subTip={Maple World Goddess's Blessing (5th Job)} subVal={extra +400%}>

attackStats.detail: <bg src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/feral-resonance.png} tip={Feral Resonance (3rd Job)} val={+5%}> <bg src={/class-icons/common/sharp-eyes.png} tip={Sharp Eyes (4th Job)} val={+15%}> <bg src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/extended-magazine.png} tip={Extended Magazine (4th Job)} val={+10%}> <bg src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/wild-instinct.png} tip={Wild Instinct (4th Job)} val={+15%}> <bg type={opt} src={/class-icons/5th-job/vicious-shot.png} tip={Vicious Shot (5th Job)} val={+50% of Crit Rate}>

linkSkill.name: Spirit of Freedom
linkSkill.shortDesc: Grants 12 seconds of invincibility after being revived. Removed upon moving to another map.
details: Can be stacked up to 4 times, once for each unique Resistance character (Except Demons and Xenon) to reach Master Level

build: <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/savage-bound.png} tip={Savage Bound}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/natures-wrath.png} tip={Nature's Wrath}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/ravenous-gait.png} tip={Ravenous Gait}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/wild-arrow-blast-proto.png} tip={Wild Arrow Blast: Proto}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/predators-pounce.png} tip={Predator's Pounce}>

<tt src={/class-icons/common/physical-training.png} tip={Physical Training}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/primal-edge.png} tip={Primal Edge}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/crossbow-mastery.png} tip={Crossbow Mastery}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/agile-crossbows.png} tip={Agile Crossbows}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/call-of-the-wild.png} tip={Call of the Wild}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/soul-arrow.png} tip={Soul Arrow: Crossbow}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/common/final-attack.png} tip={Final Attack}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-rending-swipe.png} tip={Assist: Rending Swipe}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/wild-arrow-blast-detonation.png} tip={Wild Arrow Blast: Detonation}>

<tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/feral-resonance.png} tip={Feral Resonance}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/slinking-titan.png} tip={Slinking Titan}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/trap-seed.png} tip={Trap Seed}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/wild-arrow-blast-shattershot.png} tip={Wild Arrow Blast: Shattershot}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-snapping-fangs.png} tip={Assist: Snapping Fangs}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/another-bite.png} tip={Another Bite}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/white-heat-rush-1.png} tip={White Heat Rush}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/feline-berserk.png} tip={Feline Berserk}>

<tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/extended-magazine.png} tip={Extended Magazine}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/wild-instinct.png} tip={Wild Instinct}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/crossbow-expert.png} tip={Crossbow Expert}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/advanced-final-attack.png} tip={Advanced Final Attack}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/wild-arrow-blast-apex.png} tip={Wild Arrow Blast: Apex}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/common/maple-warrior.png} tip={Maple Warrior}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/common/sharp-eyes.png} tip={Sharp Eyes}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-skull-bash.png} tip={Assist: Skull Bash}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/command-alpha-surge.png} tip={Command: Alpha Surge}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/lure-beacon.png} tip={Lure Beacon}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/common/heros-will.png} tip={Hero's Will}>
details: All 1st to 4th Job skills can be maxed
Put one SP into each skill first and then max each skill in this order
For any skills that have prerequisites, follow them first before following build path

hyperBuild.recommended: <bp_<tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/wild-arrow-blast-apex-reinforce.png} tip={Wild Arrow Blast: Apex - Reinforce}> Wild Arrow Blast: Apex - Reinforce_<tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-reinforce.png} tip={Assist - Reinforce}> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-boss-rush.png} tip={Assist - Boss Rush}> Assist - Reinforce and Boss Rush_<tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/another-bite-reinforce.png} tip={Another Bite - Reinforce}> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/another-bite-boss-rush.png} tip={Another Bite - Boss Rush}> Another Bite - Reinforce and Boss Rush_>

nodes: <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-rending-swipe.png} tip={Assist: Rending Swipe (2nd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-snapping-fangs.png} tip={Assist: Snapping Fangs (3rd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-skull-bash.png} tip={Assist: Skull Bash (4th Job)}>

<tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/wild-arrow-blast-apex.png} tip={Wild Arrow Blast: Apex (4th Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/common/final-attack.png} tip={Final Attack/Another Bite (2nd/3rd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/trap-seed.png} tip={Trap Seed/Volt Snare (3rd Job/Hyper Skill)}>

<tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/command-alpha-surge.png} tip={Command: Alpha Surge (4th Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/command-titan-pounce.png} tip={Command: Titan Pounce (Hyper Skill)}> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/white-heat-rush-1.png} tip={White Heat Rush (3rd Job)}>
notes: Any combination of these skills are good but preferred from same category as you want to max primary first
6 Boost Nodes total are needed to reach Master Level 60 for these skills (with Matrix Points used)<bp_Nodes with the same Main Skill (skill at the top) cannot be equipped at the same time_>

possible.nodes: <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/wild-arrow-blast-proto.png} tip={Wild Arrow Blast: Proto/Ignite/Centerline (1st/2nd/3rd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-rending-swipe.png} tip={Assist: Rending Swipe (2nd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-snapping-fangs.png} tip={Assist: Snapping Fangs (3rd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/common/final-attack.png} tip={Final Attack/Another Bite (2nd/3rd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/white-heat-rush-1.png} tip={White Heat Rush (3rd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-skull-bash.png} tip={Assist: Skull Bash (4th Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/trap-seed.png} tip={Trap Seed/Volt Snare (3rd Job/Hyper Skill)}> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/wild-arrow-blast-apex.png} tip={Wild Arrow Blast: Apex (4th Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/command-alpha-surge.png} tip={Command: Alpha Surge (4th Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/command-titan-pounce.png} tip={Command: Titan Pounce (Hyper Skill)}>

credits: Inner Ability + Hyper Passive Build + Boost Nodes Build

extraContent.title: Assist and Command Skills
content: In 2nd Job, Wild Hunter unlocks [Assist] skills that are activated upon successful Crossbow Skills - skills that use the crossbow to attack. Each [Assist] skill activates in the following order and repeats:

<bp_<tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-rending-swipe.png} tip={Assist: Rending Swipe (2nd)}> Assist: Rending Swipe (2nd Job)_<tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-snapping-fangs.png} tip={Assist: Snapping Fangs (3rd Job)}> Assist: Snapping Fangs (3rd Job)_<tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-skull-bash.png} tip={Assist: Skull Bash (4th Job)}> Assist: Skull Bash (4th Job)_>

In 4th Job, Wild hunter unlocks [Command] skills that commands <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/jaguar-rider.png} tip={Jaguar Rider (1st Job)}> Ashlii to attack. While using Crossbow Skills, [Command] skills can be used without a casting animation
Below is a list of all [Command] skills:

<bp_<tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/command-alpha-surge.png} tip={Command: Alpha Surge (4th Job)}> Command: Alpha Surge (4th Job)_<tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/command-titan-pounce.png} tip={Command: Titan Pounce (Hyper Skill)}> Command: Titan Pounce (Hyper Skill)_<tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/command-predators-eye.png} tip={Command: Predator's Eye (5th Job)}> Command: Predator's Eye (5th Job)_>

primary.name: Crystal Throw
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 7, Damage: 40
primary.desc: Throws a rock that deals fixed damage

primary.name: Infiltrate
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 15, Hide for 30 sec, Movement Speed: +15
primary.desc: Turn invisible preventing touch damage

primary.name: Potion Mastery
primary.shortDesc: Recovery Rate: +115%

primary.name: Secret Assembly
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 100, you move to the Resistance Secret Plaza\nCooldown: 600 sec

primary.name: Hero's Echo
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, increases Attack Power & Magic ATT by 4% for 2400 sec\nCooldown: 300 sec
details: To obtain this skill, complete the quest <link href={https://maplestorywiki.net/w/Quests/16/End_of_Special_Training} title={"End of Special Training"}>
Affects all nearby players

primary.name: Wild Arrow Blast: Proto
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 10, Max Enemies Hit: 5, Damage: 130%, Number of Attacks: 3
primary.desc: Fire a piercing arrow forward

primary.name: Jaguar Rider
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 20, Ride Ashlii\nSpeed While Riding: 40, Knockback Resistance: +50%\nCooldown: 1 sec.
primary.desc: Mount onto Ashlii the Jaguar to attack
details: While mounted, gain increased Speed and %Knockback Resistance

primary.name: Savage Bound
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 10, allows you to jump a greater distance
primary.desc: Double jump skill
details: Can be assigned a Key Slot or activated by pressing jump twice<bp_While in the air, pressing together with the Up Arrow Key will perform a vertical jump_>
Horizontal jump can be used twice in a row

primary.name: Predator's Pounce
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 10, marks the closest enemy within range as pray, Duration: 600 sec
Use the skill again to teleport to the marked target's location
Mark Switch Cooldown: 0.5 sec
[Passive Effect: Speed +20, Jump +20]
primary.desc: Mark an enemy that allows you to teleport to the target upon pressing the Skill Key
details: [Passive]: Permanently increases Speed and Jump
Marks the closest enemy within range
Pressing the Down Arrow Key and Skill Key together will mark a different enemy as target

primary.name: Predator's Pounce: Footstool
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 10. Allows you to leap a greater distance.
primary.desc: Leap forward
details: Can only be used after casting <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/predators-pounce.png} tip={Predator's Pounce (1st Job)}> and is deactivated upon using
Shares the same Skill Points (SP) with <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/predators-pounce.png} tip={Predator's Pounce (1st Job)}>

primary.name: Ravenous Gait
primary.shortDesc: Speed: +35, Max Speed: +20, Defense: +53%, Knockback Resistance: +50%\nDamage Taken: -20%

primary.name: Nature's Wrath
primary.shortDesc: Critical Rate: +30%, Attack Power: +30, Max HP: +20%, Attack Speed: +1

primary.name: Wild Arrow Blast: Detonation
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 20, Max Enemies Hit: 5, Damage: 200, Number of Attacks: 4
primary.desc: Fire an exploding arrow forward

primary.name: Assist: Rending Swipe
primary.shortDesc:
Activates automatically upon landing a Crossbow skill (unless on cooldown)
Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 756%, Number of Attacks: 6
Assist Skill Cooldown: 2.5 sec
(All Assist Skills share the same cooldown.)
primary.desc: Periodically upon landing successful Crossbow attacks, Ashlii slashes at nearby enemies
details: All [Assist] skills share a cooldown and is unaffected by Damage Reflect and cooldown resets

primary.name: Call of the Wild
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 40, Duration: 300 sec., Party Attack Power and Magic ATT: +10%\n[Passive Effect: Damage Taken: -15%, Bonus Avoidability: +15%, Max MP: +15%]

primary.name: Final Attack
primary.shortDesc: [Final Attack Skills] Final Attack Chance Upon Landing a Direct Crossbow Attack: 40%, Damage: 150%
primary.desc: Successful Crossbow attacks have a chance to deal an additional hit

primary.name: Soul Arrow
primary.shortDesc: Attack Power +20. Allows you to attack without consuming arrows.
details: Uses the arrow with the highest Attack to calculate your damage

primary.name: Agile Crossbows
primary.shortDesc: Attack Speed: +2, DEX: +20

primary.name: Crossbow Mastery
primary.shortDesc: Crossbow Mastery: +50%, Damage: +10%

primary.name: Primal Edge
primary.shortDesc: Final Damage: +10%, Critical Rate: +25%, Knockback Resistance: +50%

primary.name: Physical Training
primary.shortDesc: Permanently increase STR by 30 and DEX by 30.

primary.name: Wild Arrow Blast: Shattershot
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, fires a piercing arrow, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 490%, Number of Attacks: 3\nAdditionally, launches an explosive round at set intervals, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 368%, Number of Attacks: 4\nExplosive Round Cooldown: 2 sec.
primary.desc: Fire forward a piercing arrow
details: While firing, periodically fires an explosive round that damages nearby enemies<bp_Unaffected by Damage Reflect and cooldown resets_>

primary.name: White Heat Rush
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 20, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 1200%
primary.desc: Dash diagonally and push enemies away
details: Pressing the Down Arrow Key and Skill Key together will dash downwards diagonally
While on the ground, pressing the Left or Right Arrow Keys and Skill Key together instead dashes forward in the direction pressed

While unmounted, pressing the Attack Key and Skill Key together will perform the dash unmounted<bp_Right-clicking the skill toggles ON/OFF a function to dash unmounted by pressing only the Skill Key_>

primary.name: Trap Seed
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 80, Duration: 60 sec., Mine Deployment Interval: 5 sec.\nMine explosions Max Enemies Hit: 5, Damage: 756%, Number of Attacks: 4\nUp to 1 mines detonate at a time on a single boss from the same deployment
primary.desc: Summon forward a trap that periodically deploys mines that explode when an enemy touches them
details: Bosses will detonate a single mine at a time from the same deployment
You will not enter combat state from summoning trap and mines will not deploy outside of combat
Unaffected by Damage Reflect

primary.name: Assist: Snapping Fangs
primary.shortDesc: Activates automatically upon landing a Crossbow skill (unless on cooldown)\nMax Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 821%, Number of Attacks: 6
primary.desc: Periodically upon landing successful Crossbow attacks, Ashlii bites at nearby enemies
details: Activates after <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-rending-swipe.png} tip={Assist: Rending Swipe (2nd Job)}>
All [Assist] skills share a cooldown and is unaffected by Damage Reflect and cooldown resets

primary.name: Feline Berserk
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 100, Invincibility Duration: 2 sec.\nCooldown: 70 sec.
primary.desc: When used, briefly become invincible
details: Unaffected by cooldown resets

primary.name: Backstep
primary.shortDesc: While activated, Ashlii can attack while moving backward.
primary.desc: While toggled, walk and attack backward without changing directions
details: Effect also applies when unmounted

primary.name: Another Bite
primary.shortDesc:
The Spirit Jaguar's attacks apply stacks of Another Bite, Duration: 90 sec.
Max Another Bite Debuff Stacks: 50
Assist Skills: 1 Stacks, Command Skills: 2 Stacks per attack
Crossbow skills used on enemies with Another Bite stacks deal an additional attack, Damage: 250%, Number of Attacks: 2
primary.desc: Successful [Assist] and [Command] attacks applies a stacking debuff to enemies (up to 50)
details: [Debuff - Another Bite]: Successful Crossbow attacks consumes a stack of the debuff and triggers an additional attack
Unaffected by Damage Reflect

primary.name: Feral Resonance
primary.shortDesc: Final Damage: +15%, Critical Rate: +14%, Critical Damage: +5%

primary.name: Slinking Titan
primary.shortDesc: Max HP: +50%, Elemental Resistance: +31%, Abnormal Status Resistance: +46, Avoidability: +30%\nRecover 7% of Max HP every 5 sec

primary.name: Wild Arrow Blast: Apex
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 10, Max Enemies Hit: 7, Damage: 434% of continuous attack\nAddtionally fires an explosive round at set intervals, Max Enemies Hit: 7, Damage: 355%, Number of Attacks: 4, Explosive RRound Normal Enemy Damage: +190% (additive)\nExplosive Bolt Cooldown: 1.5 sec.
primary.desc: While held, fire a stream of piercing arrows forward
details: While firing, periodically fires an explosive round that damages nearby enemies<bp_Explosive round deals increased %Damage to regular monsers by a flat amount_Unaffected by Damage Reflect and cooldown resets_>

primary.name: Assist: Skull Bash
primary.shortDesc: Activates automatically upon landing a Crossbow skill (unless on cooldown)\nMax Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 875%, Number of Attacks: 6
primary.desc: Periodically upon landing successful Crossbow attacks, Ashlii tackles nearby enemies
details: Activates after <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/assist-snapping-fangs.png} tip={Assist: Snapping Fangs (3rd Job)}>
All [Assist] skills share a cooldown and is unaffected by Damage Reflect and cooldown resets

primary.name: Command: Alpha Surge
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 97, Damage: 712%, Number of Attacks: 6, Max Enemies Hit: 12, Number of Hits: 5\nCooldown: 20 sec.
primary.desc: Command Ashlii to release a pack of Spirit Jaguars forward
details: Can be used without a casting animation while using Crossbow skills
Unaffected by cooldown resets

primary.name: Lure Beacon
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 80, Sets up a luring device that taunts enemies within a set range for 60 sec.
primary.desc: Place down a lure that draws in enemy aggression
details: Enemies drawn by the lure prevents them from dealing touch damage
Enemies that don't attack the lure after a set duration will break free from the lure's effect

primary.name: Sharp Eyes
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 45, Critical Rate: +20%, Critical Damage: +15%, Duration: 300 sec

primary.name: Maple Warrior
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 70, Goddess of Maple World appears\n[Passive Effect: All stats with a direct AP investment increase by 15%]
details: Skill is a passive, the active effect does nothing except displays an animation

primary.name: Hero's Will
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30\nCooldown: 300 sec
primary.desc: Removes certain abnormal status effects and become immune to Abnormal Status for 3 secs
details: Unaffected by <tt src={/class-icons/explorers/paladin/combat-orders.png} tip={Temporarily increases all of your skill levels. Only 4th Job Skills can be increased beyond master level while other skills can only be increased to master level. Exceptions: Some special skills, beginner skills, Combat Orders, hyper skills, 5th job skills, and 6th job skills cannot be increased.}/> Combat Orders

primary.name: Extended Magazine
primary.shortDesc: Final Damage: +30%, Critical Damage: +10%

primary.name: Crossbow Expert
primary.shortDesc: Crossbow Mastery: +70%, Attack Power: +30, Final Damage: +10%
details: Increases %Weapon Mastery provided
Now grants flat Attack and increases %Final Damage

primary.name: Advanced Final Attack
primary.shortDesc: Attack Power: +20 permanently\n[Final Attack Skill] Upon landing a direct attack skill using a crossbow, Final Attack Chance: 70%, Damage: 190%
details: Increases activation chance and %Damage
Now grants flat Attack

primary.name: Wild Instinct
primary.shortDesc: Ignore Defense: +40%, Final Damage: +10%, Critical Damage: +15%

hyperActive.name: Volt Snare
hyperActive.shortDesc: MP Cost: 300, Max Enemies Hit: 15, Damage: 180%, Number of Attacks: 12\nStun Duration: 10 sec. (+ up to 100% additional, scaling with how much damage Volt Snare dealt).\nCooldown: 120 sec.
hyperActive.desc: Launch a net that binds nearby enemies

hyperActive.name: Command: Titan Pounch
hyperActive.shortDesc: MP Cost: 150, Damage: 490%, Number of Attacks: 8, Max Enemies Hit: 12, Number of Hits: 7\nCooldown: 20 sec.
hyperActive.desc: Command Ashlii to release a pack of Spirit Jaguars that pounce at nearby enemies within range
details: Can be used without a casting animation while using Crossbow skills
Prioritzes bosses with the highest Max HP within range
Unaffected by Damage Reflect

hyperActive.name: For Liberty
hyperActive.shortDesc: MP Cost: 100, Duration: 60 sec, Damage: +10%\nOnly applies to Demon, Resistance, and Xenon party members.\nCooldown: 120 sec.

fifthMain.name: Command: Predator's Eye
fifthMain.shortDesc: MP Cost: 300, Damage: 787%, Number of Attacks: 10, Max Enemies Hit: 15, Number of Strikes: 9\nCooldown: 20 sec
fifthMain.desc: Command Ashlii to release an attack that damages a large area
details: Can be used without a casting animation while using Crossbow skills
Prioritzes bosses with the highest Max HP
Right-clicking the skill toggles ON/OFF the inversion visual effect
Unaffected by Damage Reflect

fifthMain.name: Wild Arrow Blast: Overdrive
fifthMain.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 1000, Max Hold Duration: 3.5 sec., Enemies Hit: 12,  Damage: 1045%, Number of Consecutive Attacks: 7
When this skill lands, an additional explosion occurs that can attack up to 12 enemies with 748% damage 5 times. The explosions can trigger Another Bite stacks.
While holding the skill, you take 50% less damage (including from attacks that scale on Max HP)
Cooldown: 120 sec.
fifthMain.desc: While held, fire a barrage of piercing arrows forward
details: Successful attacks trigger an additional explosion attack<bp_Explosion can trigger <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/another-bite.png} tip={Another Bite (3rd Job)}> [Another Bite] stacks_>
While held, reduces damage taken including %Max HP attacks, you will not be knocked back at all (Super Knockback Resistance), and prevents Critical Abnormal Statuses

fifthMain.name: Primal Bloom
fifthMain.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 1000, Duration: 20 sec., Invincibility Duration: 10 sec.
Applies 30 Another Bite stack(s) onto up to 15 enemies
Sets the Assist skill cooldown to 1.5 sec. All Assist skills activate at once when an Assist skill is used
Command Skills Cooldown: -40%
Another Bite Stacks Triggered Upon Landing a Crossbow Skill: 2
Cooldown: 120 sec.
fifthMain.desc: When used, applies <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/another-bite.png} tip={Another Bite (3rd Job)}> [Another Bite] stacks to nearby enemies and grants the following effects:
details: Grants invincibility for a short duration
Reduces the cooldown of [Assist] skills and all [Assist] skills activate at once upon triggering
Reduces the cooldown of [Command] skills
Successful Crossbow skills apply <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/another-bite.png} tip={Another Bite (3rd Job)}> [Another Bite] stacks
Right-clicking the skill toggles ON/OFF the color and background visual effect

fifthMain.name: Overbite
fifthMain.shortDesc:
Invincible for 1.9 sec. upon use
Triggers automatically when the boss with the highest Max HP reaches 60 Another Bite stacks, consuming the stacks.
If multiple bosses have the same Max HP, stacks from all applicable bosses are consumed as well.
Roars 4 times. Each roar attacks up to 15 enemies with 909% damage 13 times.
fifthMain.desc: Upon activating a set amount of <tt src={/class-icons/resistance/wild-hunter/another-bite.png} tip={Another Bite (3rd Job)}> [Another Bite] stacks on a boss, release a roar that damages nearby enemies
details: If multiple bosses have the same Max HP, stacks from all applicable bosses are counted
Attack only triggers when used on a boss that can be attacked
Unaffected by Damage Reflect

masteryCore.name: HEXA Wild Arrow Blast: Apex
masteryCore.shortDesc: MP Cost: 12, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 742% of continuous attack\nAdditionally fires an explosive round at set intervals, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 612%, Number of Attacks: 4, Explosive Round Normal Enemy Damage: +408% (additive)\nExplosive Bolt Cooldown: 1.2 sec.

masteryCore.shortDesc:
Activates automatically upon landing a Crossbow skill (unless on cooldown)
Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 1421%, Number of Attacks: 6
Assist Skill Cooldown: 2.5 sec
(All Assist Skills share the same cooldown.)

masteryCore.name: HEXA Another Bite
masteryCore.shortDesc:
The Spirit Jaguar's attacks apply stacks of Another Bite, Duration: 90 sec.
Max Another Bite Debuff Stacks: 50
Assist Skills: 1 Stacks, Command Skills: 2 Stacks per attack
Crossbow skills used on enemies with Another Bite stacks deal an additional attack, Damage: 450%, Number of Attacks: 2
details: Unlocked with 4th Mastery Node

masteryCore.name: HEXA Final Attack
masteryCore.shortDesc: [Final Attack Skill] Final Attack Chance Upon Landing A Direct Crossbow Attack: 71%, Damage: 346%
details: Unlocked with 4th Mastery Node

masteryCore.name: HEXA Trap Seed
masteryCore.shortDesc: MP Cost: 90, Duration: 60 sec., Mine Deployment Interval: 5 sec.\nMine explosions Max Enemies Hit: 5, Damage: 1360%, Number of Attacks: 4\nUp to 1 mines detonate at a time on a single boss from the same deployment
details: Unlocked with 4th Mastery Node

skillCore.name: Synchronous Hunt
skillCore.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 1200, invincible during casting
Max Enemies Hit: 15, Damage: 2496%, Number of Attacks: 7, Number of Strikes: 44, triggers 10 Wild Strikes, which deal 2730% damage 14 times
All attacks are consumed when Another Bite activates
Cooldown: 360 sec

skillCore.name: Gear Storm
skillCore.shortDesc: MP Cost: 1000, Invincible during casting\nSummons a large ballista, producing 23 shockwaves that deal 3176% damage to up to 15 enemies 12 times. The ballista's bombardment devestates the battlefield 11 times, dealing 7469% damage 15 times.\nIgnore Defense: +60%, Boss Damage: +40%, Critical Rate: 100%

boostCore.shortDesc: Wild Arrow Blast: Overdrive Final Damage: +60%

boostCore.shortDesc:

HEXA Assist: Rending Swipe Damage: +155% (additive)
HEXA Assist: Snapping Fangs Damage: +180% (additive)
HEXA Assist: Skull Bash Damage: +190% (additive)

HEXA Command: Titan Pounce Damage: +95% (additive)

meta: Wild Hunter is a DEX archer class part of the Resistance class group. Wild Hunter uses Crossbows as their primary weapons. For their secondary weapon, Wild Hunter can equip Arrowheads
